_comment: Smart Poller config — copy this file to config.json and fill in your actual values

_notes.app_id: Feishu App ID (get from Feishu Open Platform: https://open.feishu.cn/app)
_notes.app_secret: Feishu App Secret (from the same page as app_id)
_notes.doc_token: Task board document ID (extract from document URL)
_notes.assignee: Current agent identifier, e.g. agent1 / agent2
_notes.silent_mode: true = no notification when no tasks (saves Token usage)
